name: 5' x 7' Outdoor Rug Singing Birds - Threshold™
description: Bring nature-inspired beauty to your patio, deck or porch with the Outdoor Rug Singing Birds from Threshold™. This all-weather rug is great for outdoor use, and it combines playful style with comfortable cushioning underfoot and easy care (just rinse with a hose). This rectangular outdoor rug is decorated with a beautiful scenic print of blue birds perched on floral branches over a textured sky-blue background for a touch of outdoorsy flair. Plus, the striped rug has a spray latex backing to help keep it in place wherever you choose to arrange it.
